input.reasoning: Selected Wyndham Garden Austin as it perfectly meets all user requirements: (1) Pet-friendly ✓, (2) Outdoor pool ✓, (3) Free parking ✓, (4) Rate per night of $80 is well under the $150/night budget ✓. The total cost for 3 nights is $239, which provides excellent value. The hotel has a solid 4.0 rating and offers additional amenities like hot tub, room service, and airport shuttle. While the user requested a location near South Congress Avenue, none of the candidates explicitly mention this location, so I selected the best option that meets all other specified constraints. Hotels 1 and 2 also meet the core requirements but are slightly more expensive. Hotel 3 lacks free parking and a pool. input.final_message_to_user: Great news! I found the perfect hotel for your Austin trip from July 10-13, 2026. The Wyndham Garden Austin checks all your boxes: it's pet-friendly, has an outdoor pool, offers free parking, and costs only $80/night ($239 total for 3 nights) - well under your $150/night budget! You'll also enjoy extras like a hot tub, room service, and free Wi-Fi. This 3-star hotel has a solid 4.0 rating and will give you excellent value for your stay. Note: I wasn't able to confirm the exact proximity to South Congress Avenue from the search results, so you may want to verify the location meets your needs when booking.
